steps.title: Use the square rule
steps.content: For any real number $x$, the square $x^2$ cannot be negative. The smallest possible value of $x^2$ is $0$.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
The equation requires:
$$x^2=-784$$
Since $-784$ is negative, there are no real solutions.

steps.title: Choose the count
steps.content: The number of distinct real solutions is zero. The answer is D.
